subject: Weekly Reflection
notes: Solved 10 Leetcode problems including 2 medium (Group Anagrams, Top K Frequent). Focused heavily on mastering hashmaps/sets. Learned defaultdict, key immutability, time/space complexity estimation, and problem-solving patterns like bucket sort and key tuple tricks. Started learning stack and queue logic and applying them to problems. Gained strong intuition for hashmap coding.
